texto: We took morphine, diamorphine, cyclozine, codeine, temazepam, nitrezepam, phenobarbitone, sodium amytal dextropropoxyphene, methadone, nalbuphine, pethidine, pentazocine, buprenorphine, dextromoramide chlormethiazole. The streets are awash with drugs that you can have for unhappiness and pain, and we took them all. Fuck it, we would have injected Vitamin C if only they'd made it illegal.
explicacao: Citação de Irwin Welsh sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “We took morphine, diamorphine, cyclozine, codeine, temazepam, nitrezepam, phenobarbitone, sodium …” articula felicidade, drugs, novel em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e novel.
